svg_code:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 640 200">
  <defs>
    <!-- Gradients -->
    <linearGradient id="nightSky" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0D1B2A"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#1A1A2E"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#16213E"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="spiralGlow" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="60%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#F4A261" stop-opacity="0.4"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#E63946" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="warmCore" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#F77F00"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#E63946"/>
    </radialGradient>
    
    <filter id="glow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="blur"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="blur"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
    
    <filter id="starGlow" x="-100%" y="-100%" width="300%" height="300%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="1" result="blur"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="blur"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  
  <style>
    @keyframes spiralRotate {
      0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }
    }
    @keyframes pulseGlow {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes twinkle {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.3; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes floatUp {
      0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
      50% { transform: translateY(-3px); }
    }
    @keyframes windowFlicker {
      0%, 90%, 100% { opacity: 0.8; }
      92% { opacity: 0.3; }
      95% { opacity: 0.9; }
    }
    .spiral-group { transform-origin: 320px 130px; animation: spiralRotate 60s linear infinite; }
    .glow-pulse { animation: pulseGlow 4s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .star { animation: twinkle 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .star:nth-child(odd) { animation-delay: -1.5s; }
    .float { animation: floatUp 6s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .window { animation: windowFlicker 8s ease-in-out infinite; }
  </style>
  
  <!-- Night Sky Background -->
  <rect width="640" height="200" fill="url(#nightSky)"/>
  
  <!-- Stars -->
  <g filter="url(#starGlow)">
    <circle class="star" cx="50" cy="25" r="1.5" fill="#E8E8E8" style="animation-delay: 0s;"/>
    <circle class="star" cx="120" cy="40" r="1" fill="#F4A261" style="animation-delay: -0.5s;"/>
    <circle class="star" cx="180" cy="18" r="1.2" fill="#E8E8E8" style="animation-delay: -1s;"/>
    <circle class="star" cx="250" cy="35" r="0.8" fill="#9B5DE5" style="animation-delay: -1.5s;"/>
    <circle class="star" cx="400" cy="22" r="1.3" fill="#E8E8E8" style="animation-delay: -2s;"/>
    <circle class="star" cx="480" cy="38" r="1" fill="#2A9D8F" style="animation-delay: -2.5s;"/>
    <circle class="star" cx="550" cy="15" r="1.4" fill="#E8E8E8" style="animation-delay: -3s;"/>
    <circle class="star" cx="590" cy="45" r="0.9" fill="#F4A261" style="animation-delay: -0.8s;"/>
    <circle class="star" cx="85" cy="55" r="0.7" fill="#E8E8E8" style="animation-delay: -1.2s;"/>
    <circle class="star" cx="620" cy="28" r="1.1" fill="#E8E8E8" style="animation-delay: -2.2s;"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- NYC Skyline Silhouette - Simplified Geometric -->
  <g fill="#0D1B2A" opacity="0.9">
    <!-- Far left buildings -->
    <rect x="20" y="120" width="25" height="80"/>
    <rect x="50" y="100" width="20" height="100"/>
    <rect x="75" y="130" width="18" height="70"/>
    
    <!-- Left cluster -->
    <rect x="100" y="85" width="22" height="115"/>
    <rect x="125" y="95" width="18" height="105"/>
    
    <!-- Empire State inspired -->
    <rect x="150" y="60" width="28" height="140"/>
    <rect x="158" y="45" width="12" height="15"/>
    <rect x="162" y="35" width="4" height="10"/>
    
    <!-- Mid buildings -->
    <rect x="185" y="110" width="20" height="90"/>
    <rect x="210" y="90" width="24" height="110"/>
    
    <!-- Right of Guggenheim -->
    <rect x="440" y="95" width="22" height="105"/>
    <rect x="468" y="80" width="26" height="120"/>
    <rect x="500" y="105" width="20" height="95"/>
    
    <!-- Chrysler inspired -->
    <rect x="525" y="55" width="24" height="145"/>
    <polygon points="537,55 525,75 549,75"/>
    <polygon points="537,42 532,55 542,55"/>
    
    <!-- Far right -->
    <rect x="555" y="100" width="22" height="100"/>
    <rect x="582" y="115" width="25" height="85"/>
    <rect x="612" y="125" width="28" height="75"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Skyline Windows - Warm lights -->
  <g class="window">
    <rect x="155" y="70" width="3" height="4" fill="#F4A261" opacity="0.8"/>
    <rect x="165" y="80" width="3" height="4" fill="#F77F00" opacity="0.7"/>
    <rect x="155" y="95" width="3" height="4" fill="#F4A261" opacity="0.6"/>
    <rect x="170" y="105" width="3" height="4" fill="#E63946" opacity="0.5"/>
    <rect x="475" y="90" width="3" height="4" fill="#F4A261" opacity="0.7"/>
    <rect x="485" y="105" width="3" height="4" fill="#F77F00" opacity="0.6"/>
    <rect x="530" y="65" width="3" height="4" fill="#F4A261" opacity="0.8"/>
    <rect x="540" y="80" width="3" height="4" fill="#9B5DE5" opacity="0.6"/>
    <rect x="532" y="95" width="3" height="4" fill="#2A9D8F" opacity="0.7"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Ambient glow behind Guggenheim -->
  <ellipse cx="320" cy="150" rx="90" ry="60" fill="url(#spiralGlow)" class="glow-pulse"/>
  
  <!-- Guggenheim Museum - The Spiral Lantern -->
  <g class="float">
    <!-- Base/ground -->
    <rect x="255" y="175" width="130" height="25" fill="#1A1A2E" rx="3"/>
    <rect x="260" y="178" width="120" height="4" fill="#457B9D" opacity="0.3"/>
    
    <!-- Museum base structure -->
    <path d="M270 175 L275 140 L365 140 L370 175 Z" fill="#2A2A4A" stroke="#F4A261" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.8"/>
    
    <!-- The Iconic Spiral Rings - Balloon-like concentric forms -->
    <g class="spiral-group" filter="url(#glow)">
      <!-- Outermost ring -->
      <ellipse cx="320" cy="130" rx="65" ry="35" fill="none" stroke="#E63946" stroke-width="8" opacity="0.9"/>
      <ellipse cx="320" cy="130" rx="65" ry="35" fill="none" stroke="#F4A261" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
      
      <!-- Second ring -->
      <ellipse cx="320" cy="125" rx="52" ry="28" fill="none" stroke="#F77F00" stroke-width="7" opacity="0.85"/>
      <ellipse cx="320" cy="125" rx="52" ry="28" fill="none" stroke="#F4A261" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.4"/>
      
      <!-- Third ring -->
      <ellipse cx="320" cy="120" rx="40" ry="22" fill="none" stroke="#F4A261" stroke-width="6" opacity="0.8"/>
      <ellipse cx="320" cy="120" rx="40" ry="22" fill="none" stroke="#E8E8E8" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
      
      <!-- Fourth ring -->
      <ellipse cx="320" cy="115" rx="28" ry="16" fill="none" stroke="#2A9D8F" stroke-width="5" opacity="0.85"/>
      
      <!-- Inner ring -->
      <ellipse cx="320" cy="110" rx="17" ry="10" fill="none" stroke="#9B5DE5" stroke-width="4" opacity="0.9"/>
      
      <!-- Core -->
      <ellipse cx="320" cy="108" rx="8" ry="5" fill="url(#warmCore)" opacity="0.95"/>
    </g>
    
    <!-- Decorative balloon strings/light rays emanating -->
    <g opacity="0.4">
      <line x1="320" y1="165" x2="300" y2="185" stroke="#F4A261" stroke-width="0.5"/>
      <line x1="320" y1="165" x2="320" y2="190" stroke="#E63946" stroke-width="0.5"/>
      <line x1="320" y1="165" x2="340" y2="185" stroke="#F4A261" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    </g>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Floating celebration orbs around museum -->
  <g filter="url(#glow)">
    <circle class="float" cx="240" cy="100" r="6" fill="#E63946" opacity="0.7" style="animation-delay: -1s;"/>
    <circle class="float" cx="400" cy="95" r="5" fill="#9B5DE5" opacity="0.6" style="animation-delay: -2s;"/>
    <circle class="float" cx="260" cy="75" r="4" fill="#2A9D8F" opacity="0.65" style="animation-delay: -3s;"/>
    <circle class="float" cx="385" cy="70" r="4.5" fill="#F77F00" opacity="0.6" style="animation-delay: -1.5s;"/>
    <circle class="float" cx="420" cy="115" r="3.5" fill="#457B9D" opacity="0.7" style="animation-delay: -2.5s;"/>
    <circle class="float" cx="225" cy="120" r="4" fill="#F4A261" opacity="0.65" style="animation-delay: -0.5s;"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Subtle reflection on ground -->
  <ellipse cx="320" cy="195" rx="50" ry="5" fill="#F4A261" opacity="0.15"/>
  
  <!-- Ground line -->
  <line x1="0" y1="200" x2="640" y2="200" stroke="#457B9D" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
</svg>
description: The Guggenheim's iconic spiral transforms into a luminous lantern rising against the Manhattan night. Concentric elliptical rings in coral, orange, gold, teal, and purple rotate slowly like celebration ribbons, while floating orbs ascend around the glowing museum. The simplified geometric skyline frames this warm beacon with twinkling windows, creating a sense of buoyant whimsy against the deep blue-black sky.
